repo.title: GitHub - vercel/chatbot: A full-featured, hackable Next.js AI chatbot built by Vercel · GitHub

manifest_entry.name: Vercel AI Chatbot
manifest_entry.focus: AI workspace and chat product patterns
teaches: chat layout composition for real products
how to integrate AI into a serious product shell

copying AI aesthetics without matching the product job
